A template for pull requests, including guidelines for issue linking, testing, and documentation updates.

# Purpose
The content is a template for pull request (PR) submissions in a software project. It guides contributors to open a ticket describing the issue or feature that the PR addresses and to follow the steps outlined in `CONTRIBUTING.rst`. Contributors must replace the initial comment with a description of the change and how it addresses the linked ticket. The template includes a checklist to ensure that contributors add tests, update documentation, summarize changes in `CHANGES.rst`, and verify that all tests pass using `pytest` and `tox`. Additionally, contributors should run `pre-commit` hooks to fix any issues before submitting the PR.
